title: AN ACT TO FURTHER AMEND SECTION TWENTY OF THE CHARTER OF THE CITY OF DAVAO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4982 / 53 OG No. 15, 4786 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1679, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO FURTHER AMEND SECTION TWENTY OF THE CHARTER OF THE CITY OF DAVAO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section twenty of Commonwealth Act Numbered Fifty one, otherwise known as the Charter of the City of Davao, as amended by Republic Act Numbered Thirteen hundred sixty-eight, is further amended to read as follows:

"SEC. 20.

The Assistant City Attorneys.

âThe city attorney shall have five assistants who shall each receive a compensation as follows: the first assistant, three thousand nine hundred sixty pesos; the second assistant, three thousand seven hundred twenty pesos; the third assistant, three thousand four hundred eighty pesos; the fourth assistant, three thousand three hundred pesos; and the fifth assistant, three thousand one hundred twenty pesos."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
